title: Dolo Odo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Dolo Odo with a Z-Score of +4.89. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Dolo Odo has resulted in a high CDD of 16.1 GG, indicating significant cooling degree days. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 20.2 km/h may provide some relief, but overall conditions remain extreme.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact in Dolo Odo.
